market_brief.summary_en: Risk Regime at 52.1/100 MIXED with SPY and QQQ both in DANGER zone after 7 and 6 distribution days respectively despite positive closes.

symbol_briefs.brief_en: TSM closed at $455.10, up 5.26% with all EMAs above price and golden cross intact. Stage2 6/7 and RS 100.0 confirm strong uptrend structure near 52-week high. Posts emphasize TSMC's AI manufacturing dominance and supply shortages as primary drivers.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: TSM $455.10에 마감, 모든 이평선 위 GC 유지. Stage2 6/7 RS 100.0로 강한 상승 추세 확인. 소셜에서 AI 제조 우위와 공급 부족이 주요 동력으로 언급됐다.
symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_en: EMA21 $433.25 support with entry target zone within 5% of current price
symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_ko: EMA21 $433.25 지지, 현재가 대비 5% 이내 진입 목표대

symbol_briefs.brief_en: NVDA closed at $194.97 with price below EMA21 $204.84 and EMA50 $204.93. Stage2 4/7 and RS 51.3 show mixed signals despite monthly uptrend confirmation. Constructive views center on AI infrastructure momentum and PLTR sovereign AI partnership.

symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_ko: EMA200 $188.80 지지선, 거래량 수축으로 에너지 축적 신호

symbol_briefs.brief_en: META closed at $562.60 below EMA21 $577.95 and all higher EMAs. Stage2 2/7 and RS 24.9 confirm downtrend structure 29.1% below 52-week high. Traders highlight bullish technical setup and new AI releases like Brain2Qwerty v2.

symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_ko: 현재 구간 거래량 수축으로 안정화 가능성

symbol_briefs.brief_en: TSLA closed at $411.84, up 8.46% but remains below EMA21 $399.36 wait no, price above EMA21 yet structure labeled DOWNTREND. Stage2 5/7 with euphoric social score 2.0. Strong positive reaction to FSD v14 Lite rollout on older hardware and European regulatory momentum.

symbol_briefs.brief_en: PLTR closed at $115.70 with price well below EMA21 $126.27 and all higher EMAs. Stage2 0/7 and RS 0.0 indicate distribution phase 44.2% below 52-week high. Expanded Nvidia partnership for sovereign AI and US Army NGC2 contract momentum support long-term holder conviction.

symbol_briefs.key_risk_en: RS 0.0 and Stage2 0/7 with 29.3% pullback from entry target

symbol_briefs.brief_en: MU closed at $1,145.28 with all EMAs above price and golden cross intact. Stage2 6/7 and RS 100.0 confirm strong uptrend 8.7% below 52-week high. Record earnings, Anthropic partnership and HBM/AI demand driving aggressive bullish targets.

symbol_briefs.brief_en: CRWD closed at $742.91, up 5.96% with all EMAs above price and golden cross confirmed. Stage2 7/7 and RS 100.0 mark highest quality setup 5.4% below 52-week high. Strong earnings beat, AI tailwinds and upcoming 4-for-1 stock split noted in social discussion.

symbol_briefs.brief_en: GOOGL closed at $353.65 below EMA21 $359.26. Stage2 5/7 and RS 73.7 with downtrend structure yet monthly uptrend confirmed. Dow Jones inclusion drove 4-5% pop and index milestone despite AI spending caution.
